title: pericallis lanata
intro: Pericallis lanata, also known as the woolly pericallis, is a flowering plant native to the Canary Islands, characterized by its unique, woolly leaves and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pericallis lanata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be administered orally or topically.
